cards.duringText: If you declared a SMASH for this attack and Deku dealt 2 or less combat damage, do not gain 1 Injury.
cards.title: Controlled Smash

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, draw 1 card. If you lost the combat, your opponent discards 1 random card.
cards.title: Heroic Mission

cards.afterText: If you lost the combat, draw 2 cards.
cards.title: Heroic Grit

cards.duringText: This card's value is +1 for each Injury Deku has.
cards.title: Heroic Spirit

cards.afterText: Move Deku up to 3 spaces. He may move through opposing fighters. Deal 1 damage to each opposing fighter adjacent to Deku.
cards.title: Shoot Style

cards.basicText: Move Deku up to 5 spaces. Then, deal 1 damage to an opposing fighter adjacent to him.
cards.title: You Say Run

cards.basicText:
Resolve each effect in order if Deku has at least that many Injury:
4) Recover 2 health
3) Lose 1 Injury
2) Gain 1 action
1) Draw 1 card
cards.title: Plus Ultra

cards.afterText: Move the opposing fighter up to 5 spaces.
cards.duringText: You may BOOST this card. If you did not SMASH it, shuffle the card used to BOOST into your deck.
cards.title: Detroit Smash

cards.afterText: Move the opposing fighter up to 5 spaces.
cards.basicText: This card's effects cannot be canceled.
cards.duringText: Your opponent may BOOST their card.
cards.title: Delaware Detroit Smash

cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: Feint

cards.duringText: If Deku started this turn in a different space, this card's value is 5 instead.
cards.title: Momentous Shift

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, choose one of the fighters in the combat and move them up to 2 spaces.
cards.title: Skirmish

hero.name: Deku
hero.specialAbility: When you place your attack card, you may SMASH it. When you SMASH an attack, increase your card’s value by 3 and Deku gains 1 Injury after the attack.

ruleCards.content:
Deku receives Set Backs based on how many Injury Deku has gained. 
1: -1 Attack.
2: -1 Attack and -1 MOVE.
3: -1 Attack, -1 MOVE and -1 Defense.
4: -2 Attack, -1 MOVE, -1 Defense.
5: Deku is defeated.
ruleCards.title: Injury Set Backs

name: Deku
note:
Deku uses the incredible power of One For All to SMASH through his foes. However, it’s power is so great that in using it Deku gravely injures himself. If Deku uses his power too much he becomes dramatically weaker and could even be defeated by his own power. But Deku’s Heroic Spirit is indomitable and even if he breaks his body down he finds the strength to go beyond!
DM me on Discord for Smash/Injury tokens. DreamCarver#5089
